title: dorycnium fulgurans
intro: Dorycnium fulgurans, also known as the flash gentian or golden bird's eye, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make herbal tinctures, capsules, or topical creams for its medicinal properties.
